Class EfsSubscribeStatus<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.bus.EfsSubscribeStatus<E>
Type Parameters:
E - event class.
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEfsEvent
@ThreadSafe public final class EfsSubscribeStatus<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object implements IEfsEvent
This event is sent to publishing agents to inform on number of in-place subscribers for a given topic. If there are zero subscribers, then publisher should cease publishing events to the topic. Failure to do so results in an IllegalStateException.

If subscriber count > zero, then publisher is clear to publish events to topic. Previous subscriber count is provided to allow publisher to determine if subscriber count is growing or shrinking.

Author:
Charles W. Rapp

    INVALID_SUBSCRIBERS_COUNT

    • builder

      public static <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsSubscribeStatus.Builder<E> builder()
      Returns a new EfsSubscribeStatus builder instance. It is recommended that a new builder be used for each new EfsSubscribeStatus event rather than re-using a builder to create multiple events.
      Type Parameters:
      E - subscribe status event applies to this event.
      Returns:
      a new EfsSubscribeStatus event builder.
